/usr/bin/g++ -g -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/Lab5App.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/Lab5App.dir/Lab5App_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Lab5App.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Lab5App.dir/mainwindow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Lab5App.dir/bitset.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Lab5App.dir/keyboardtrainer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Lab5App.dir/stringdemo.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Lab5App.dir/bitsetdemo.cpp.o -o Lab5App  -Wl,-rpath,/home/andrey/Документы/553504/second_sem_lrs/OAIP/LAB_5/build/Desktop-Debug/stringlib /usr/lib/libQt6Widgets.so.6.11.0 /usr/lib/libQt6Gui.so.6.11.0 stringlib/libstringlib.so /usr/lib/libGLX.so /usr/lib/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib/libQt6Core.so.6.11.0
